request_inquiries.description: The list of requests that were made.

total_amount_inquired.description: The total amount originally inquired for this batch.

event_id.description: The ID of the associated event if the request batch was made using 'split the bill'.

reference_split_the_bill.description: The reference to the object used for split the bill. Can be Payment, PaymentBatch, ScheduleInstance, RequestResponse and MasterCardAction
